verification.subject: Verify your BlastArena account
verification.heading: Welcome to BlastArena!
verification.body: Click the link below to verify your email address:
verification.ignore: If you didn't create an account, you can ignore this email.

emailChange.subject: Confirm your new email address — BlastArena
emailChange.heading: Email Change Request
emailChange.body: You requested to change your BlastArena email to this address.
emailChange.action: Click the link below to confirm:
emailChange.ignore: If you didn't request this change, you can ignore this email.

passwordReset.subject: Reset your BlastArena password
passwordReset.heading: Password Reset
passwordReset.body: Click the link below to reset your password:
passwordReset.ignore: If you didn't request a password reset, you can ignore this email.

registrationWarning.subject: Someone tried to create a BlastArena account with your email
registrationWarning.heading: Registration Attempt
registrationWarning.body: Someone tried to create a new BlastArena account using your email address.
registrationWarning.resetHint: If this was you and you've forgotten your password, you can reset it here:
registrationWarning.ignore: If this wasn't you, no action is needed — your account is safe.

emailChangeWarning.subject: Someone tried to change their BlastArena email to yours
emailChangeWarning.heading: Email Change Attempt
emailChangeWarning.body: Someone tried to change their BlastArena account email to your address.
emailChangeWarning.ignore: If this wasn't you, no action is needed — your account is unaffected.

test.subject: BlastArena — Test Email
test.heading: Test Email
test.body: This is a test email from BlastArena to verify your SMTP configuration is working correctly.
